name: Usx
description_short: USX Federal Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit financial institution serving the Cranberry Township, Pennsylvania area with traditional credit union services.
description_long: USX Federal Credit Union is a federally-chartered credit union based in Cranberry Township, Pennsylvania. As a member-owned, not-for-profit institution, it operates under NCUA (National Credit Union Administration) insurance rather than FDIC coverage, distinguishing it from traditional banks. The organization maintains administrative offices at 1293 Freedom Road and provides financial services to its membership community. Members can access accounts through a dedicated online banking portal and mobile app (powered by Fiserv), and the institution provides lending products through partnered loan platforms. The credit union maintains multiple channels for member communication and support, including toll-free phone support and a physical administrative office. As a credit union, USX FCU is structured as a cooperative owned by its members rather than shareholders, which typically results in lower fees, competitive rates, and reinvestment of profits back into member benefits. The institution emphasizes accessibility, offering specialized support for low-vision users and maintaining transparent cookie and privacy policies on their digital platforms. The institution appears to be a smaller, regional credit union with traditional service offerings but lacks comprehensive online information about loan types, share account rates, or competitive advantages that would help prospective members make informed decisions.
services: Online banking platform with secure login
Administrative and member services at physical office
pros: Member-owned, not-for-profit structure typically offers lower fees and competitive rates
NCUA insurance protection for member deposits
Online banking available through Fiserv platform with mobile app access
Toll-free customer support at 1-888-219-3159 for member convenience
Lending products available through internet loan platform partnerships
Local physical office at Cranberry Township for in-person service
Accessibility features including low-vision support enabled on website
cons: Minimal online product information limits ability to compare rates and terms
Regional credit union may have limited geographic reach or branch network
Website lacks details on membership eligibility requirements or enrollment process
Limited visibility into competitive advantages, specific loan products, or account features
No published fee schedules or rate information available for review
best_for: Residents of Cranberry Township, Pennsylvania and surrounding areas seeking local banking
Members who value not-for-profit financial institutions and cooperative ownership structures
Customers preferring credit unions over traditional banks for potential fee savings
People seeking personalized service with online and physical branch access
diagnosis: USX Federal Credit Union is best suited for residents in the Cranberry Township, Pennsylvania area who prefer member-owned, not-for-profit financial institutions and can visit or contact their local office. The primary caveat is that the website provides limited public information about specific products, rates, and services, requiring prospective members to contact the credit union directly via phone or email to understand membership eligibility and offerings.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
